response.original_title: Mahsa (or, the Girl That Ate Her Way Home)
response.overview: Armed with a voracious curiosity, impulsive slant, and intrinsic ability to connect with others, Mahsa Darabi embarks on a journey to find her way back to her Iranian roots through the common language of food.
response.title: Mahsa (or, the Girl That Ate Her Way Home)
